name: pb-graphiti
description: Shared temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti + Neo4j) wired as an MCP server. Gives Claude Code a cross-session, cross-project memory tier separate from per-project file-based auto-memory. Consumer must run the bundled docker-compose stack on the host before the MCP becomes reachable.

graphiti_url.title: Graphiti MCP URL
graphiti_url.description: Where to reach the Graphiti MCP server. Default http://localhost:8765/mcp works when Claude Code runs on the same host as the docker-compose stack (the common case). For Claude Code running inside a container (DDEV, devcontainer, etc.), change to http://host.docker.internal:8765/mcp. Note: NO trailing slash — the server 307-redirects /mcp/ to /mcp and most MCP HTTP clients do not follow POST redirects.

imap_host.title: IMAP host
imap_host.description: Used by /pb-graphiti:ingest-email. Example: imap.gmail.com, imap.fastmail.com, mail.example.com. Leave blank if you don't intend to ingest email.

imap_user.title: IMAP user (email address)
imap_user.description: The IMAP account login. Usually your full email address.

imap_folder.title: IMAP folder
imap_folder.description: Which folder to read. INBOX is the default. For Gmail-wide search use '[Gmail]/All Mail'. For Outlook archived: 'Archive'.

imap_password_env.title: IMAP password env var name
imap_password_env.description: Name of the env var holding the IMAP password (the script reads `os.environ[this]` at runtime). Default IMAP_PASSWORD. Set the actual password in your shell BEFORE running the ingest — never commit it. Use an app password if your provider supports them (Gmail, Microsoft) — not your real account password.
